allow: Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const r=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Total HIGH risk:', r.total\); r.data.forEach\(s=>console.log\(' -', s.name, '| Score:', s.riskScores?.[0]?.score, '| Level:', s.riskScores?.[0]?.level\)\) }\)")
Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const r=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Total HIGH:', r.total\) }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const r=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Total:', r.total\); r.data.forEach\(s=>console.log\(' -', s.name, '| Risco:', s.riskScores?.[0]?.level??'N/A', s.riskScores?.[0]?.score??''\)\) }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const r=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Score:', r.score, '| Level:', r.level, '| Fatores:', JSON.stringify\(r.factors\)\) }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const r=JSON.parse\(d\); if\(r\) console.log\('Score:', r.score, '| Level:', r.level\); else console.log\('null'\) }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(d\);console.log\('Total aulas:',r.total,'| Presente:',r.present,'| Faltou:',r.absent,'| Taxa:',r.rate+'%'\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(d\);console.log\('Média:',r.stats.average,'| Mais alta:',r.stats.highest,'| Mais baixa:',r.stats.lowest,'| Aprovados:',r.stats.passing,'| Reprovados:',r.stats.failing\)}\)")
Bash(pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate status)
